zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Moir於大約1295年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍時，她的父親Gillespic Campbell30歲，母親Elizabeth Stewart21歲。她和John Lamont至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於大約1353年享年60歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾考瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Moir于大约1295年出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍时，她的父亲Gillespic Campbell30岁，母亲Elizabeth Stewart21岁。她和John Lamont至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于大约1353年享年60岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾考瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Moir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Moir was born about 1295, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Gillespic Campbell, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth Stewart, was 21. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with John Lamont. She died about 1353, at the age of 60, and was buried in Cowal, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Moir est née environ 1295, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gillespic Campbell, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stewart, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec John Lamont. Elle est décédée environ 1353, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Cowal, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Moir um 1295 in Lochawe, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gillespic Campbell 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Stewart 21. Sie hatte mit John Lamont mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1353 im Alter von 60 Jahren und wurde in Cowal, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Moir è nata il circa 1295 nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gillespic Campbell, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Stewart, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con John Lamont. Morì circa 1353, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Cowal, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Moirが約1295年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルロチャウで生まれた時，父Gillespic Campbellは30歳，母Elizabeth Stewartは21歳であった。彼女はJohn Lamontとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1353年に60歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルコワルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Moir(이)가 대략 1295년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 럭아w에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gillespic Campbell(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Stewart(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 John Lamont(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1353년 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 코월에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Moir nasceu aproximadamente 1295, em Lochawe, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gillespic Campbell, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stewart, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com John Lamont. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1353, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Cowal, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Moir родилась около 1295 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gillespic Campbell было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stewart, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от John Lamont. Она умерла около 1353 г. в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности коуаль, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Moir nació aproximadamente 1295, en Lochawe, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Gillespic Campbell, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Stewart, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con John Lamont. Murió aproximadamente 1353, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Cowal, Argyll, Scotland.
